title: UK-US Financial Regulatory Working Group: Joint Statements
body: "This is a collection of the Joint Statements from the biannual UK-US Financial Regulatory Working Group (FRWG) held between HM Treasury and US Treasury and representatives from their respective supervisory authorities. These documents are released following meetings between the UK and US financial regulatory authorities to discuss bilateral cooperation on financial regulatory issues. The Joint Statements are published to reflect the outcomes and shared commitments. "
